title: claytonia berteroana
intro: Claytonia berteroana, also known as the Mexican springbeauty or beavertail, is a flowering plant that belongs to the purslane family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health issues such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium, iron, and potassium, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall health and well-being. Claytonia berteroana can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function, soothe digestive issues, and even alleviate symptoms of menopause.
